description:
Debug Network Faster & Smarter with Proxyman

Proxyman is a high-performance Windows app, which enables developers to capture, inspect, and manipulate HTTP/HTTPS requests/responses with ease.
✨ Features
- Support Dark Theme for Windows and Linux
- Introduce new Image Metadata for Image Body. Easier to check the size, width, height, and Exif data.
- Introduce new SSE and OpenAPI tabs: Easier to preview OpenAPI completion or response
- Introduce new UI for SSL Proxying List
- Auto start/stop the system proxy when the system is sleep/wake up.

⚡️ Improve
- Improve the UI of entire app: New App icon for Menu Context, better UI.
- Zstandard Decompression Support Update

🐞 Bugs
- Error Alert when open the app on Linux due to invalid network library
- Crash from Map Remote Table
- Crash When Deleting Request
